A.rationale: All 3 interfaces+main+dataclass, stream+file parser (testable), explicit tie-break, BOM, 8 risks, golden tests. Minor 'assert 6...(actually 7)' self-correction blemish.

B.rationale: Strong, signal-dense, expected-output oracle, out-of-scope section, 7 well-reasoned Qs. Weaker: path-only parser (less testable), plain utf-8 no BOM handling.

C.rationale: Best grounding (notes trailing blank line + skip), stream+file parser, tie-break, BOM, normalization, 8 risks, exact-value tests. Tightest at 6454 chars.

notes: All complete and disciplined. C edges A: best data grounding (trailing blank line), tightest, no blemish. A strong but has visible self-correction. B weaker on parser testability (path-only) and omits BOM handling.
